features.name: Zig 0.17-dev resolved and locked by Pantry
features.notes: The exact compiler build is locked locally and in CI.

features.name: No Git submodules
features.notes: Sibling repositories are locked by commit and checked out directly in CI.

features.name: Allocator, ownership, concurrency, feature, and atomic hot-reload contracts
features.notes: Runtime publication pins in-flight requests to immutable generations; reclamation, errors, feature discovery, and connector responsibilities are explicit and tested.

features.name: Five inspection phases plus logging lifecycle
features.notes: Connection setup is pre-phase; the five stable phase numbers, legal transitions, early exits, terminal drop behavior, and exactly-once logging finalization are enforced.

features.name: Detection-only interventions
features.notes: Interventions preserve evidence, are marked non-enforcing, and do not interrupt or terminate detection-only transactions. Detailed action precedence remains scoped to WAF-15.

features.name: Bounded scalar transaction variables with phase availability and origins
features.notes: The 78-name stable scalar registry, aliases, origins, phase gates, connection/request/response producers, UTC timing, monotonic duration, body diagnostics, identity, persistent RESOURCE binding, matched values, and minimum-severity semantics are executable. Full buffered body materialization remains WAF-24/WAF-28.

features.name: Bounded collections, targets, exclusions, counts, origins, and runtime macros
features.notes: The 37-namespace registry, bounded owned storage, repeated/map mutations, source offsets, phase gates, exact and zig-regex selectors, exclusions, counts, explicit matcher errors, and configured baseline macro semantics are executable. HTTP/body/XML producers and persistent backends remain in their linked downstream issues.

features.name: SQL injection detection
features.notes: Native adapter is live; complete libinjection differential parity is not yet claimed.

features.name: Revisioned TX and persistent IP, SESSION, USER, GLOBAL, and RESOURCE collections
features.notes: Bounded transaction-local mutation, persistent initialization, expiry-only state, optimistic conflict rebasing, typed fail-open/fail-closed behavior, thread-safe in-memory storage, and Pantry-linked LMDB storage are executable. SecLang text parsing and action-plan wiring consume these APIs in WAF-10 through WAF-15.

features.name: Versioned C connector ABI
features.notes: Opaque ownership, sized structs, lifecycle, feature discovery, and errors are implemented; callbacks and ABI matrix remain.

features.name: Immutable cache-efficient structural execution plans
features.notes: Owned typed IR, phase indexes, defaults, chains, action families, conservative prefilters, immutable macro programs, stable diagnostics, deterministic fingerprints, atomic component sharing, WAF generation pinning, corpus compilation, fuzzing, and ReleaseFast metrics are verified. WAF-12 owns complete directive-specific semantic validation.

features.name: Pantry-managed PostgreSQL 18 and native libpq 18
features.notes: Packages are locked; per-project cluster/port isolation is still required.

features.name: STX development and embedded production assets
features.notes: The workspace and pinned STX source exist; the fingerprinted asset compiler remains.

features.name: HTTP/1.1 reverse proxy
features.notes: Standalone data-plane implementation has not started.

features.name: HTTP/2 reverse proxy through nghttp2
features.notes: The adapter is scheduled after HTTP/1.1 framing and backpressure.
